title: helichrysum bellum
intro: Helichrysum bellum, also known as the False Rosemary, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits of Helichrysum bellum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum bellum can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
